description: 9-axis MEMS IMU (gyro + accel + AK09916 magnetometer), I2C/SPI

fields.name: I2C_MST_ODR_CONFIG
fields.description: ODR configuration for external sensor when gyroscope and accelerometer are disabled

fields.name: I2C_LOST_ARB
fields.description: Asserted when I^2 C slave loses arbitration of the I^2 C bus, will cause an interrupt if bit I2C_MST_INT_EN in the INT_ENABLE register is asserted.

fields.name: DISABLE_ACCEL
fields.description: Only the following values are applicable: 111 - Accelerometer (all axes) disabled. 000 - Accelerometer (all axes) on.

fields.name: DISABLE_GYRO
fields.description: Only the following values are applicable: 111 - Gyroscope (all axes) disabled. 000 - Gyroscope (all axes) on.

fields.name: REG_WOF_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable wake on FSYNC interrupt. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: WOM_INT_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable interrupt for wake on motion to propagate to interrupt pin 1. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: PLL_RDY_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable PLL RDY interrupt (PLL RDY means PLL is running and in use as the clock source for the system) to propagate to interrupt pin 1. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: DMP_INT1_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable DMP interrupt to propagate to interrupt pin 1. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: I2C_MST_INT_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable I^2 C master interrupt to propagate to interrupt pin 1. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: FIFO_WM_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable interrupt for FIFO watermark to propagate to interrupt pin 1. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: PLL_RDY_INT
fields.description: 1 - Indicates that the PLL has been enabled and is ready (delay of 4 ms ensures lock).

fields.name: DMP_INT1
fields.description: 1 - Indicates the DMP has generated INT1 interrupt.

fields.name: I2C_MST_INT
fields.description: 1 - Indicates I^2 C master has generated an interrupt.

fields.name: ZA_OFFS
fields.description: Lower bits [6:0] of the Z accelerometer offset cancellation. +/- 16g Offset cancellation in all Full Scale modes, 15 bit 0.98-mg steps.

fields.name: WIA2
fields.description: Device ID of AK09916, fixed value 0x48

Magnetometer.name: XA_OFFS_L
Magnetometer.description: Lower bits of X accelerometer offset

fields.name: XA_OFFS
fields.description: Lower bits XA_OFFS[6:0] of X accelerometer offset cancellation

fields.name: DEC3_CFG
fields.description: Controls the number of samples averaged in the accelerometer decimator

Magnetometer.name: I2C_SLV4_DO
Magnetometer.description: Data out register for I2C slave 4 when set to write

fields.name: YA_OFFS
fields.description: Lower bits [6:0] of the Y accelerometer offset cancellation. +/- 16g Offset cancellation in all Full Scale modes, 15 bit 0.98-mg steps.

Accelerometer.name: I2C_SLV2_DO
Accelerometer.description: Data out register for I2C slave 2

Gyroscope.name: XG_OFFS_USRL
Gyroscope.description: Lower byte of X gyro offset cancellation

Gyroscope.name: YG_OFFS_USRL
Gyroscope.description: Lower byte of Y gyro offset cancellation

Gyroscope.name: ZG_OFFS_USRL
Gyroscope.description: Lower byte of Z gyro offset cancellation

Temperature.name: TEMP_OUT_L
Temperature.description: Low byte of temperature sensor data

External Sensor Data.name: EXT_SLV_SENS_DATA_09
quality_issues: address 0x44 not found in register summary table

fields.name: DELAY_TIME_EN
fields.description: 0: Disables delay time measurement between FSYNC event and the first ODR event (after FSYNC event). 1: Enables delay time measurement between FSYNC event and the first ODR event (after FSYNC event).

fields.name: WOF_DEGLITCH_EN
fields.description: Enable digital deglitching of FSYNC input for Wake on FSYNC.

fields.name: WOF_EDGE_INT
fields.description: 0: FSYNC is a level interrupt for Wake on FSYNC. 1: FSYNC is an edge interrupt for Wake on FSYNC. ACTL_FSYNC is used to set the polarity of the interrupt.

fields.name: EXT_SYNC_SET
fields.description: Enables the FSYNC pin data to be sampled. EXT_SYNC_SET FSYNC bit location. 0: Function disabled. 1: TEMP_OUT_L[0]. 2: GYRO_XOUT_L[0]. 3: GYRO_YOUT_L[0]. 4: GYRO_ZOUT_L[0]. 5: ACCEL_XOUT_L[0]. 6: ACCEL_YOUT_L[0]. 7: ACCEL_ZOUT_L[0].

fields.name: SLV_3_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write EXT_SENS_DATA registers associated to SLV_3 (as determined by I2C_SLV2_CTRL, I2C_SLV1_CTRL, and I2C_SL20_CTRL) to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: SLV_2_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write EXT_SENS_DATA registers associated to SLV_2 (as determined by I2C_SLV0_CTRL, I2C_SLV1_CTRL, and I2C_SL20_CTRL) to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: SLV_1_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write EXT_SENS_DATA registers associated to SLV_1 (as determined by I2C_SLV0_CTRL and I2C_SLV1_CTRL) to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: SLV_0_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write EXT_SENS_DATA registers associated to SLV_0 (as determined by I2C_SLV0_CTRL) to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: ACCEL_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write ACCEL_XOUT_H, ACCEL_XOUT_L, ACCEL_YOUT_H, ACCEL_YOUT_L, ACCEL_ZOUT_H, and ACCEL_ZOUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: GYRO_Z_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write GYRO_ZOUT_H and GYRO_ZOUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: GYRO_Y_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write GYRO_YOUT_H and GYRO_YOUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: GYRO_X_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write GYRO_XOUT_H and GYRO_XOUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: TEMP_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write TEMP_OUT_H and TEMP_OUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: FIFO_CNT
fields.description: High bits of FIFO byte count

fields.name: ODR_ALIGN_EN
fields.description: 0: Disables ODR start-time alignment. 1: Enables ODR start-time alignment when any of the following registers is written.

I2C_Slaves.name: I2C_SLV1_DO
I2C_Slaves.description: Data out register for I2C slave 1

fields.name: EXT_SLV_SENS_DATA_07
